summary:
- **Рассылки**  
  [Short Ruby](https://newsletter.shortruby.com/), [Ruby Weekly](https://rubyweekly.com/), [Hotwire Weekly](https://www.hotwireweekly.com/)

- **Видео-доклады**  
  [Ruby events videos](https://www.rubyevents.org/talks)

- **Подкасты**  
  [RubyGems](https://www.buzzsprout.com/2509083), [Rooftop Ruby](https://www.rooftopruby.com), [Remote Ruby](https://www.remoteruby.com), [Dead Code](https://shows.acast.com/dead-code), [On Rails](https://onrails.buzzsprout.com), [Ruby On Rails](https://www.therubyonrailspodcast.com)

- **Соцсети**  
  [Ruby Starter Pack (Bluesky)](https://bsky.app/starter-pack/joshuawood.net/3kw3olx5gf72m), [Ruby Social (Mastodon)](https://ruby.social/about)

- **Slack**  
  [Ruby Central](https://rubycentral.org/news/), [Rails Link](https://github.com/railslink/resources/wiki)

- **Discord**  
  [Ruby](https://discord.gg/jahDscMp), [GoRails](https://discord.gg/gorails-874684608686477352)

- **Форумы**  
  [Ruby Forum](https://www.ruby-forum.com/), [r/ruby](https://www.reddit.com/r/ruby/), [r/rubyonrails](https://www.reddit.com/r/rubyonrails/), [Rails Discourse](https://discuss.rubyonrails.org/)

- **RubyFriends**  
  [О проекте](https://rubyfriends.app), [Профиль](https://rubyfriends.app/profiles/VSZM)

- **Митапы**  
  [Глобальный список](https://rubyconferences.org/meetups/), [OnRuby (Европа)](https://www.onruby.eu)

- **Конференции**  
  [Ruby events](https://www.rubyevents.org/events)
